languages.text: {n}Вам отвечает глубокий и ровный голос. Таким можно усмирить даже разъяренного {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}грокса{/g}.{/n} "Скажи, слуга Империума, что движет твоим желанием помочь нам?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Вам отвечает глубокий и ровный голос. Таким можно усмирить даже разъярённого {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}грокса{/g}.{/n} "Скажи, слуга Империума, что движет твоим желанием помочь нам?"

languages.text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"
languages.original_text: {n}Вам отвечает глубокий и ровный голос. Таким можно усмирить даже разъяренного {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}грокса{/g}.{/n} "Скажи, слуга Империума, что движет твоим желанием помочь нам?"

traits.locale_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"
{n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"
{n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

languages.text: {n}一个低沉而平稳的声音回应了你。那种声音，即便是暴怒的{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}格洛克斯兽{/g}听了也能平静下来。{/n}“告诉我，帝国的仆从，你为什么会想着来帮我们？”
languages.original_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

traits.locale_text: {n}一个低沉而平稳的声音回应了你。那种声音，即便是暴怒的{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}格洛克斯兽{/g}听了也能平静下来。{/n}“告诉我，帝国的仆从，你为什么会想着来帮我们？”

languages.text: {n}La voix qui vous répond est profonde et monocorde, du genre qui serait capable de calmer un {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} enragé.{/n} « Dites-moi, {mf|serviteur|servante} de l'Imperium, pourquoi désirez-vous nous apporter votre aide ? »
languages.original_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix qui vous répond est profonde et monocorde, du genre qui serait capable de calmer un {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} enragé.{/n} « Dites-moi, {mf|serviteur|servante} de l'Imperium, pourquoi désirez-vous nous apporter votre aide ? »

languages.text: {n}Derin ve düzgün bir ses sana cevap veriyor. Öfkeli bir {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}groksu{/g} bile sakinleştirebilecek türden bir ses.{/n} "Söylesenize İmparatorluk'un hizmetkarı, neden bize yardım ediyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Derin ve düzgün bir ses sana cevap veriyor. Öfkeli bir {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}groksu{/g} bile sakinleştirebilecek türden bir ses.{/n} "Söylesenize İmparatorluk'un hizmetkarı, neden bize yardım ediyorsunuz?"

languages.text: {n}Te responde una voz profunda y tranquila. Es la clase de voz que podría calmar a un {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} furioso.{/n} «Dime, sirviente del Imperium, ¿qué te motiva a querer ayudarnos?».
languages.original_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Te responde una voz profunda y tranquila. Es la clase de voz que podría calmar a un {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} furioso.{/n} «Dime, sirviente del Imperium, ¿qué te motiva a querer ayudarnos?».

languages.text: {n}Eine tiefe und klangvolle Stimme antwortet dir. Eine Stimme, die selbst einen wütenden {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}Grox{/g} besänftigen würde.{/n} "Sagt mir, {mf|Diener|Dienerin} des Imperiums, warum wollt Ihr uns helfen?"
languages.original_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine tiefe und klangvolle Stimme antwortet dir. Eine Stimme, die selbst einen wütenden {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}Grox{/g} besänftigen würde.{/n} "Sagt mir, {mf|Diener|Dienerin} des Imperiums, warum wollt Ihr uns helfen?"

languages.text: {n}深い、そして落ち着いた声で答えてくれる。怒っている{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}グロックス{/g}さえも落ち着かせるような声だ。{/n}「帝国のしもべよ、我々を助けるという君の願いは何で駆り立てられているのか？」
languages.original_text: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"

traits.locale_text: {n}深い、そして落ち着いた声で答えてくれる。怒っている{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}グロックス{/g}さえも落ち着かせるような声だ。{/n}「帝国のしもべよ、我々を助けるという君の願いは何で駆り立てられているのか？」
